theme: the verified-skill chain (vertical slice) — turn the placeholder seeder's hollow world into one real hero (Maya). The PersonaSeeder writes the verified-skill 7-table fan-out (jobsimulation.sessions -> validation_attempt_results -> validation_attempt_skill_results -> validation_criterion_results -> public.local_jobsimulation_sessions -> user_skills -> user_skill_evidences UPSERT) per (hero x skill); the TaxonomyRefs resolver draws real public skiller node-ids (role-coherent, empty-pool skip-don't-fabricate); the G14 jobsim_sessions fix writes valid free-text enum/result/token + a continuous growth-arc score; users.go gives real names/avatars/org-domain emails; the seed-side closure gene (datadna measure-closure) proves 0 dangling node-ids. Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.
